---
title: "Assignment 1"
subtitle: "Deep Learning for Visual Computing"
author:
  - name: "Ruslan Basyrov"
    email: ruslan.basyrov@tuwien.ac.at
  - name: "Iana Bembeeva"
    email: e52017248@student.tuwien.ac.at
    
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

## Results

### Test Accuracy by Model

{{< include build/figures/test_accuracy.qmd >}}

### Figure 1: Validation Mean Per-Class Accuracy

::: {#fig-curves}

{{< include build/figures/val_accuracy_curves.qmd >}}

Validation mean per-class accuracy for the best CNN, ResNet18, and ViT configurations. The checkpoint for each model was selected according to the highest validation mean per-class accuracy.

:::
